text: Structural load-carrying capacity of steel railway bridges built in mid-19th century is examined. The reason for preparing this paper is the previously published article published in quarterly journal *Roads and Bridges - Drogi i Mosty*, No. 2 (2014). According to the authors, in the assessment of century-old bridges it is necessary to take into consideration the changes in the properties of the materials occurring during time and the fatigue load accumulated during many years of operation.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
